phases.goal: Scaffold the local-first Next.js app, testing stack, env validation, and shared UI shell.
Implement local-first authentication plumbing and the organization creation onboarding flow.
Build organization-scoped settings, master data CRUD, and teacher membership management.
Implement session creation, participant snapshots, teacher session views, and record submission.
Add the operator dashboard, records search/detail, and final local smoke-test support.
Rename visible program copy to business copy, add operator back navigation, and make invite tokens reusable with test-first execution.
Allow sessions to be created before teacher and roster details are complete while preserving submission rules, and treat this as the first half of a same-release bundle with phase 7.
Add the operator session management surface that completes the phase 6 create-first workflow in the same release window.
Document and verify the flexible session management smoke path with a Supabase-backed local dev run, migrations, and manual smoke evidence.
